EXPLANATION: The cited source is the official Llama 3.1 Community License Agreement published by Meta, which is hosted on the official Hugging Face repository for the model. The discrepancies reported by the automated checker are due to metadata extraction differences regarding the repository page title versus the actual document name.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct/blob/main/LICENSE
FOUND_TITLE: LLAMA 3.1 COMMUNITY LICENSE AGREEMENT
FOUND_AUTHORS: Meta Platforms, Inc
